ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "grade" INTEGER /* Grade level of the student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the student attends */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district the student's school is in */,
  "eligible" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the student is eligible for free or reduced-price lunch */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the student */,
  "parental_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for parents or guardians */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the school */,
  "exit_date" TEXT /* Date the student left the school (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district the school is in */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the school is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the school is located */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the school */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the school principal */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in the school */,
  "grades_offered" TEXT /* Grades offered by the school (e.g., K-12) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the district */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the district is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the district is located */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the district */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the district */,
  "superintendent_name" TEXT /* Name of the district superintendent */,
  "total_schools" INTEGER /* Number of schools in the district */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level for which the subject is taught */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours associated with the subject */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the assessment is for */,
  "assessment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., test, quiz) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was given */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the assessment in minutes */,
  "max_score" INTEGER /* Maximum possible score for the assessment */,
  "passing_score" INTEGER /* Passing score for the assessment */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher who created or administered the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_assessments" (
  "student_assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student's assessment result */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who took the assessment */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment */,
  "score" REAL /* Score the student received on the assessment */,
  "proficiency_level" TEXT /* Proficiency level achieved by the student (e.g., Basic, Proficient, Advanced) */,
  "attempt_number" INTEGER /* Number of attempts the student has made on the assessment */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided to the student on the assessment */,
  "date_taken" TEXT /* Date the assessment was taken by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assessments_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assessments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assessments_proficiency_level FOREIGN KEY ("proficiency_level") REFERENCES proficiency_levels ("proficiency_level_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "proficiency_levels" (
  "proficiency_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proficiency level */,
  "proficiency_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the proficiency level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the proficiency level */,
  "score_range" TEXT /* Score range for the proficiency level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proficiency_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., teacher, administrator) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
